sample_rows.Interaction Description: Trioxsalen may increase the photosensitizing activities of Verteporfin.
Aminolevulinic acid may increase the photosensitizing activities of Verteporfin.
Titanium dioxide may increase the photosensitizing activities of Verteporfin.

description: This dataset provides a comprehensive collection of drug-drug interactions (DDIs) intended for research in predicting and understanding complex interaction relationships between drugs. It is sourced from the Drug Bank database and is designed to support multi-task learning approaches in the domain of bioinformatics and pharmacology. Feature Details: Drug 1: Name of the first drug in the interaction. Drug 2: Name of the second drug in the interaction. Interaction Description: Detailed description of the interaction between the two drugs. It contains 191,541 rows and 3 columns in CSV format.
embedding_text: Dataset: Drug-Drug Interactions Dataset. Source: https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/mghobashy/drug-drug-interactions?select=db_drug_interactions.csv. Domain: healthcare, pharmacology, drug-drug interaction analysis. Rows: 191541. Columns: 3. Description: This dataset provides a comprehensive collection of drug-drug interactions (DDIs) intended for research in predicting and understanding complex interaction relationships between drugs. It is sourced from the Drug Bank database and is designed to support multi-task learning approaches in the domain of bioinformatics and pharmacology. Feature Details: Drug 1: Name of the first drug in the interaction. Drug 2: Name of the second drug in the interaction. Interaction Description: Detailed description of the interaction between the two drugs. Column preview: Drug 1, Drug 2, Interaction Description. Use this dataset for retrieval, metadata search, and question answering over local healthcare data.
